envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. Slack catch-up summary now ranks as the first OPERATING-substrate aha moment since C2 Slack runtime is LIVE (Section 4 PR #185 + CT PR #21).

items.name: Aha Moment Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Aha Moment Map recommendation regions for admin governance review. Slack catch-up summary now LANDABLE since Slack OPERATING. Safe-fallback aha moments require minimal review. Other connector aha moments wait on respective C-slice runtimes.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin approves first-week aha moments per role. Slack catch-up substrate LIVE per C2; admin can approve today. Safe-fallback aha moments require no connector.
items.model_usage_notes: Slack catch-up summary aha moment has runtime substrate (PR #185); admin approval lands a working surface today. Other connector aha moments stay in DEFER until their C-slice runtime lands.
escalation_path: Otzar Administrator → Workflow Owner / Vendor Admin
Workflow Owner → Founder (for cross-org aha-moment expansions)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved aha moments propose per-role DMW scope priorities
Safe-fallback aha moments operate inside baseline DMW scope only
Slack-based aha moments scope to PERSONAL or ENTERPRISE wallet per ADR-0046 dual-context
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every aha-moment activation
Workflow Stage 2+ progression governance-bound per ADR-0081
Safe-fallback always available even when no connectors activate
C2 Slack OPERATING substrate enables immediate Slack catch-up approval
safe_defaults: Wave 6 matrix as ranking input only
